enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannukulle?

The song is an energetic dance number that encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment.

Who are the singers of Kannukulle?

The song is sung by Javed Ali and Priya Himesh.

Who composed the music for Singam 2?

The music for Singam 2 was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

What is the release year of Singam 2?

Singam 2 was released in the year 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Singam 2, the song Kannukulle serves as a high-energy dance track that captures the excitement and thrill of celebration. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it invites everyone to join in the fun and dance their hearts out. The song's vibrant mood is perfectly complemented by the dynamic vocals of Javed Ali and Priya Himesh, making it a favorite for parties and energetic gatherings. It embodies a spirit of joy and exuberance, encouraging listeners to embrace the moment and let go of their inhibitions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with Kannukulle from the electrifying movie Singam 2. This energetic track, powered by Devi Sri Prasad's dynamic beats and the vibrant vocals of Javed Ali and Priya Himesh, is a party anthem you can't miss. Feel the pulse and let the rhythm take over as you dance to this unforgettable number!
stanzaMeanings: Boys and Girls wanna get up and dance, come on, raise your glass and say what's up, what's up, what's up.
Scream and shout, let it out loud, bring the roof down, what's up, what's up, what's up.
Don't point a gun at me with your eyes, don't lift your police shirt collar.
Don't act too smart like a first-class student, I came looking for you, don't move away.
Don't come to my butterfly and scold it, don't desire to tie the zodiac sign after drawing circles.
Don't just stand there like a clean moon after using Dettol, don't do anything here. Even with a thousand efforts, why am I tired?
Don't point a gun at me with your eyes, don't lift your police shirt collar.
Boys and Girls wanna get up and dance, come on, raise your glass and say what's up, what's up, what's up.
If you smile shyly, even walking barefoot to western music brings luck to the earth.
If you stay far away, it's like a fever medicine. If you come near, it's like an energy tonic.
I turned into a computer, and when you touched me, I restarted immediately. Why are you trying to rob a strawberry baby?
Don't point a gun at me with your eyes, don't lift your police shirt collar.
Even the third world war can happen for your beauty, wearing a beautiful salwar.
For your acting, you can get an Oscar. I forgot my name in the ice you placed.
If you get angry, your cheeks turn red, and all colors appear in the rainbow there.
With your look, you add ten kilos to me.
Don't point a gun at me with your eyes, don't lift your police shirt collar.
